nodes.html: NOTICE

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: By accessing or using the Platform, all users acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to the practices described herein.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: SECTION 1: PRIVACY POLICY

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 1. Purpose and Scope

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 1.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This Privacy Policy governs the collection, use, disclosure, retention, and safeguarding of personal information obtained through the operation of the Platform.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This Policy applies to all individuals and entities accessing or using the Platform, including job seekers, employers, institutional partners, representatives, and website visitors (“Users”).

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company is committed to protecting privacy, dignity, and autonomy in all information-handling practices.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 2. Legal Compliance Framework

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 2.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3. Collection of Personal Information

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company collects only personal information that is reasonably necessary to operate the Platform, deliver services, meet legal obligations, and improve system performance.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3.1 Information Provided by Users

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company may collect:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) Identity and contact information, including name, email address, telephone number, mailing address, and optional profile image;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) Account information, including login credentials, preferences, and user role classification;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) Professional information, including résumés, education history, employment history, skills, certifications, and career preferences;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) Accessibility or accommodation information, where voluntarily disclosed;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) Employer information, including organization details, job postings, hiring preferences, interview records, and compensation information;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (f) Billing and transaction information processed through secure third-party payment service providers.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Disclosure of disability-related or accommodation information is strictly voluntary and may be withdrawn at any time.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3.2 Automatically Collected Information

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: When Users interact with the Platform, the Company automatically collects:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) IP address and approximate location;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) device type, browser type, and operating system;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) usage activity, interaction logs, and session data;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) cookies and similar tracking technologies.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This information is used for system security, fraud prevention, analytics, performance optimization, and accessibility improvements.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3.3 Information from Third Parties

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company may receive limited personal information from:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) authentication or identity-verification services;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) analytics, communication, and cloud service providers;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) authorized employer or institutional partners.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 4. Use of Personal Information

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 4.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company uses personal information to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) operate and maintain the Platform;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) create and manage user accounts;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) facilitate recruitment and job application processes;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) match job seekers with employment opportunities;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) deliver accessibility and accommodation features;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (f) personalize user experience;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (g) communicate service-related notices;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (h) prevent fraud, misuse, or security incidents;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (i) conduct analytics and improve system performance; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (j) comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company does not sell or rent personal information.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 5. Sensitive Personal Information

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 5.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Disability-related, health-related, and accommodation-related information is treated as sensitive personal information.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) collects such information only where voluntarily provided;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) uses such information solely to support accessibility and accommodation services;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) restricts access to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) applies enhanced technical and organizational safeguards.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Withdrawal of such information does not affect access to core Platform services.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 6. Artificial Intelligence and Automated Processing

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 6.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company employs artificial intelligence and statistical models to support:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) job matching and candidate recommendations;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) résumé parsing and skill identification;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) accessibility optimization; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) system performance enhancement.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Safeguards

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) AI systems assist but do not make final hiring or rejection decisions;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) all recruitment decisions remain under human authority;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) AI outputs are subject to human review;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) sensitive disability or health information is not used for hiring decisions;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) Users may request information regarding AI-assisted processing affecting them.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 7. Legal Basis for Processing

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 7.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Personal information is processed on the basis of:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) User consent;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) performance of a contract;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) legitimate business interests; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) compliance with legal or regulatory obligations.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Users may withdraw consent at any time, subject to legal or contractual restrictions.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 8. Disclosure of Personal Information

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 8.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company may disclose personal information:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) to employers where Users apply to positions or share profiles;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) to service providers supporting Platform operations;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) to affiliated corporate entities for internal operations;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) where required by law or court order; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) in connection with corporate restructuring, merger, or sale of assets.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: All third parties receiving personal information are required to maintain confidentiality and appropriate security safeguards.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 9. Employer Obligations

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 9.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 10. Cross-Border Data Transfers

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 10.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 11. Data Retention

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 11.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Personal information is retained only for as long as necessary to provide services, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements. Thereafter, information is securely deleted or anonymized.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 12. Security Measures

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 12.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 13. User Rights

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 13.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Subject to applicable law, Users may request:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) access to their personal information;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) correction of inaccurate information;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) withdrawal of consent;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) deletion where legally permissible; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) information regarding AI-assisted processing.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Requests may be submitted to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: ENABLED HR LABS INC.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Email: jeby@enabledtalent.com

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 14. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 14.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Platform uses cookies and similar technologies to maintain sessions and analyze usage. Users may control cookie settings through their browser. Disabling cookies may affect Platform functionality.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 15. Minors

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 15.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Platform is not intended for individuals under sixteen (16) years of age without appropriate authorization. The Company does not knowingly collect personal information from minors under sixteen.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 16. Amendments

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 16.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company may amend this Policy from time to time. Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the amended Policy.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: SECTION 2

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: AI TRANSPARENCY NOTICE

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Enabled Talent uses artificial intelligence to enhance recruitment efficiency, accessibility, and user experience.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: AI is used to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) recommend employment opportunities;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) identify relevant candidate skills;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) generate candidate summaries; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) improve accessibility features.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: AI is not used to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) make final hiring or rejection decisions;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) evaluate disability or health information for employment decisions; or

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) replace human judgment.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: All employment decisions remain under human authority. Users may request information regarding AI-assisted recommendations affecting them.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: SECTION 3

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: REGULATORY READINESS MEMORANDUM

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Overview

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Compliance Commitments

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company commits to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) obtaining meaningful user consent for data collection and use;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) limiting data collection to defined purposes;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) implementing strong security safeguards;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) maintaining breach-response procedures;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) ensuring accessibility-first platform design;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (f) applying human oversight to AI systems; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (g) requiring employer accountability in recruitment practices.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Conclusion

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Enabled Talent is committed to operating a lawful, privacy-respecting, and inclusive recruitment platform that protects personal information, ensures accessibility, and applies artificial intelligence responsibly.
